title: oxyceros evenosus
intro: Oxyceros evenosus, also known as the Indian forest muskwillow, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region and parts of Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Oxyceros evenosus include its ability to relieve fever, reduce pain and inflammation, and treat digestive issues, among other ailments. In traditional medicine, the plant is often used to prepare herbal remedies such as decoctions, infusions, and poultices, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
